About Me

Building the
future with
Data & AI

I'm a first-year M.Tech (Integrated) CSE student passionate about turning data into decisions and ideas into products. From writing technical documentation for robotics kits at WitBlox to developing tools at Kraftstack and designing graphics for college events — I thrive across the full spectrum of technology and creativity.

My path is driven by curiosity: I've competed in cybersecurity challenges, analyzed social media for schools, led events at the international level, and now I'm working toward AI and Machine Learning as my core domain. I love hackathons, SDG-driven projects, and building things that actually matter.
